title: Pink FPS
description: Pink Texture Pack for Enhanced FPS and Smoother Gameplay Experience!
body:
# Pink FPS Texture Pack

The **Pink FPS** PvP Texture Pack is a sleek, performance-optimized resource pack designed to enhance your Minecraft PvP experience while boosting your frame rates. Centered around a modern pink aesthetic, it features smooth, simplified textures that reduce lag without compromising on visual quality.

## 📦 **Features**

- ✨ **Custom Particles**
- 🗡️ **Custom Weapon Textures**
- 🔥 **Low Fire**
- 🏹 **Colored Bow & Crossbow Stages**
- 📋 **Transparent GUIs**
- 🔮 **No Enchantment Animation**
- 🚀 **FPS Boost**
- 🧱 **Custom Blocks**

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/2214083e-89b0-4b45-8aa0-d262c4255507.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/nikinok)

**Game Version:** 1.7 - 1.8.9  
**Optimized:** FPS BOOST ✔️
